ddls:
CREATE TABLE "union_territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each union territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the union territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the territory */,
  "population_increase" REAL /* Percentage increase in population */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Total area of the territory in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  "sex_ratio" INTEGER /* Sex ratio (number of males per 1000 females) */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate as a percentage */,
  "governor_name" TEXT /* Name of the governor */,
  "chief_minister_name" TEXT /* Name of the chief minister */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code for the territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population growth record */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the union territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population is recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population for the specified year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the population compared to the previous year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES union_territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic report */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the union territory */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report template used */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the demographic report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_reports_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES union_territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., government official, statistician, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the union territory being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., population, area) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES union_territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the union territory */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the validation failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES union_territories ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the report template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the report template (e.g., standard, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the report parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_generation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report generation log */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generated report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the report generation failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_generation_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES demographic_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaboration team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaboration team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES collaboration_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the forecasting model */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the union territory */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_results_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES union_territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)
